data.title: Russian lawmaker aims to grant limited crypto access to retail investors, plans to deregulate market with new bill.
data.description: A prominent Russian official revealed intentions for deregulating the cryptocurrency market for retail use, stating that digital assets are expected to become widespread in the country. It was announced that a bill is in the works to facilitate this shift in regulation.

data.title: Pakistan partners with Trump-affiliated World Liberty Financial to explore stablecoin payments, aims to use dollar stablecoins for cross-border transactions. Agreement signed with Ministry of Finance, emphasizing innovation in digital finance. CEO Zach Witkoff meets with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.
data.description: Pakistan's government announced a partnership with World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI), a decentralized platform linked to President Donald Trump's family, to investigate the use of stablecoins for cross-border transactions. The Pakistan Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority shared that World Liberty Financial has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the Ministry of Finance to foster innovation in digital finance. The agreement focuses on exploring the benefits of stablecoins in cross-border transactions. Zach Witkoff, World Liberty Financial's co-founder and CEO, held discussions with Pakistan's leadership, including Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, during his visit to the country. Today, the MoU was officially signed, marking a significant step in this collaboration.

data.title: Axelspace partners with Jethi Software Development PLC in Ethiopia to utilize satellite data for social good.
data.description: In Tokyo, Axelspace Corporation, a prominent microsatellite developer, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Ethiopian technology company Jethi Software Development PLC. The agreement aims to collaborate in leveraging satellite Earth observation data to tackle societal and developmental issues. The MoU was inked by Naol Debele, the CEO of Jethi. This partnership signifies a joint effort to leverage space technology for addressing challenges, demonstrating the increasing significance of innovative solutions.

data.title: Q4-2025: production data released, record annual production, achieved production guidance, and operational highlights presented.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported its production numbers. Notably, the company achieved record annual production levels. The production guidance set previously was also successfully met during this period. Additionally, several operational highlights were noted throughout the reporting period.
